title: No index on notes(spent); full table scan on every payment
description: spendable_notes SQL query filters on spent = 0 with no index. Schema (db.rs migrations v1-v6) has no index on notes(spent). A wallet running the compact-block scanner for months will accumulate thousands of rows; each payment does a full scan. Add CREATE INDEX notes_unspent ON notes(spent, account_index) to the next migration version before the scanner lands.
close_reason: Added v7 migration: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS notes_unspent ON notes(spent) WHERE spent=0; added idempotency and existence tests
